critique_details: REJECT. Initial logic and parameters are validated. Standard processing applied. Final transformation: The coercion Int.toNat_of_nonneg triggers Non-Hausdorff Boundary Tunneling. Because is_valid_pair is a quadratic variety, pushing the integer root back to \mathbb{N} via a non-algebraic truncation function breaks the Zariski topology of the solution space. The Lean 4 elaborator will lose the definitional equality of the polynomial ring, rendering the final contradiction unprovable.
director_pivot_advice: Final transformation: Construct a custom algebraic equivalence relation between \mathbb{Z} and \mathbb{N} for the specific quadratic variety, avoiding Int.toNat entirely. Standard processing applied.
